# Electrical & Electronics Engineering

Established 2007

[Faculty](/departments/eee/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To be a premier department in electrical and electronics engineering producing competent professionals.

### Mission

* Provide quality education in electrical and electronics engineering
* Promote research in power systems, renewable energy, and control systems
* Develop industry-ready engineers with strong fundamentals
* Encourage innovation and entrepreneurship

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Electrical & Electronics Engineering

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

### M.E. Power Systems Engineering

Duration: 2 yearsIntake: 18

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Basic Electrical Lab
* Electrical Machines Lab
* Power Electronics Lab
* Control Systems Lab
* Power Systems Lab
* Microprocessor Lab
